title: ASPRO 10 Pairs - Size XL(10) - White Nylon PU coated work gloves for builders, gardeners, etc 10 pairs, X-LARGE(size 10)
features: QUALITY NYLON GLOVES with polyurethane (PU) COATED PALM.
CONFORM TO EN388-4131 PRODUCT SPECIFICATION. Category II. Performance levels: resistance to abrasion - 4, cut resistance - 1, tear resistance - 3, puncture resistance - 1.
FOR VARIOUS APPLICATIONS - builders, car mechanics, gardeners, heavy duty, etc.
